headline: Carnival Gains From Strong Onboard Spending: A Yield Driver?
summary: CCL rides strong onboard spending and pricing gains, boosting yields and beating guidance as demand trends stay resilient.

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Norwegian Cruise Line, Lowers Price Target to $28
summary: Stifel  analyst Steven Wieczynski   maintains Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $30 to $28.

raw.headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Norwegian Cruise Line, Lowers Price Target to $28
raw.summary: Stifel  analyst Steven Wieczynski   maintains Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $30 to $28.

headline: How The Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) Investment Story Is Shifting After Q4 Reset And New CEO
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings is back in focus after a trim to one fair value estimate, from US$27.25 to US$26.43, roughly a 3% reduction in the price target. That shift sits between more optimistic analysts, who still talk about targets in the high twenties to low thirties, and cautious voices now clustered in the high teens to low twenties after Q4 results and guidance updates. As you read on, you will see how to track these changing targets and what they might signal about the evolving...
